chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1415 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.5929/2021. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.04.2025 Mr. Jawad A. Qureshi, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Summiya Kalwar, advocate for the respondent/SRB. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Counsel states, under instructions, that notice impugned herein shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that same be adjudicated vide a speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending aforesaid, no coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for the respondents articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
